timeline.content: Trump says he believes a deal with Iran could happen quickly - geopolitical risk premium declining rapidly in markets

Today we are going to threaten to blow up Iran. Tomorrow Trump will say we made a deal and we won again. Make a big deal about a soldier we never rescued. Then Iran will shoot more missiles and deny Americans rescued anyone.
Market opens in 12 hours and suddenly Trump is talking about a deal with Iran. He's clearly scared. Absolutely pathetic.
